checklist.text: Fix get_dm_channels: resolve other user via participants API
Fix send_reply_message: pass reply_to to HTTP send_message
Fix map_message: populate attachments list with proper URLs
Expand event stream: reactions, voice, server/channel updates
Add missing HTTP endpoints: update/delete server, channel, category, kick, group DMs, upload
Fix get_groups: return group DM channels from server
Add WS typing indicator sender (hold write half)
Fix get_channel: resolve DM channels, proper error for server channels without sid
